zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Veteripont於1232年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德利特時，他的父親John de Vipont Lord of Appleby21歲，母親Sibyl de Ferrers16歲。他於1253年與Isabel FitzJohn在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1242年被列為high sheriff of westmoreland。他去世於1264年7月7日在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭恩布利亞沙普聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Veteripont was born in 1232, in Penrith, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Vipont Lord of Appleby, was 21 and his mother, Sibyl de Ferrers, was 16. He married Isabel FitzJohn in 1253, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. In 1242, at the age of 10, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of westmoreland. He died on 7 July 1264, in Appleby, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32, and was buried in St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Veteripont est né en 1232, à Penrith, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Vipont Lord of Appleby, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Sibyl de Ferrers, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Isabel FitzJohn en 1253, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. En 1242, à l’âge de 10 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of westmoreland. Il est décédé le 7 juillet 1264, à Appleby, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Veteripont 1232 in Penrith, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Vipont Lord of Appleby 21 und seine Mutter Sibyl de Ferrers 16. Er hat 1253 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Isabel FitzJohn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. 1242, als er 10 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of westmoreland aufgeführt. Er starb am 7. Juli 1264 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Appleby, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Veteripont è nato il nel 1232 nel Penrith, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Vipont Lord of Appleby, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Sibyl de Ferrers, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Isabel FitzJohn nel 1253, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Nel 1242, all'età di 10 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of westmoreland. Morì il 7 luglio 1264, nel Appleby, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Veteripontが1232年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドペンリスで生まれた時，父John de Vipont Lord of Applebyは21歳，母Sibyl de Ferrersは16歳であった。1253年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでIsabel FitzJohnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。1242年，10歳の時，職業はhigh sheriff of westmorelandと記録されている。彼は1264年7月7日にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドアップレビーで32歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンブリアシャップスト マリー マグダリーネ'ス アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Shap Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, England: 영국 잉글랜드 쿠브리아 샤프 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Veteripont(이)가 1232년 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 펜리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Vipont Lord of Appleby(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl de Ferrers(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1253년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Isabel FitzJohn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1242년, 10세의 나이로 그의 직업은 high sheriff of westmoreland이었다. 그는 1264년 7월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 애플레비에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 쿠브리아 샤프 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Veteripont nasceu em 1232, em Penrith, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Vipont Lord of Appleby, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl de Ferrers, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel FitzJohn em 1253, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Em 1242, com 10 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of westmoreland. Ele faleceu em 7 de julho de 1264, em Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Shap Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, England: ст мэри магдеилине'с эбби, шап, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Veteripont родился в 1232 г. в местности пенрит, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Vipont Lord of Appleby было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Sibyl de Ferrers, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel FitzJohn в 1253 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. В 1242 году, в возрасте 10 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff of westmoreland. Он умер 7 июля 1264 г. в местности эпплеби, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри магдеилине'с эбби, шап, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Isabel FitzJohn en 1253, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. En 1242, a la edad de 10 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of westmoreland. Murió el 7 de julio de 1264, en Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
